task_description: Phase 21: Agentic Intelligence - Replace keyword-matching pilots with real LLM-driven agents that use tools, plan, respect permissions, cost-cap, and explain themselves. All 12 pilots refactored to use IntelligentAgent base class with AI engine DI, typed tool registry, structured planning loop, spending caps, trust score auto-pause, 24h undo, and marketplace sandbox isolation.

verification.summary: All 426 tests pass (41 test files), typecheck clean, lint clean, build clean. Tests exercise real AI-driven code paths with mocked AIEnginePort. Review issues addressed (plan parsing safety, trust score wiring, per-step budget, state guard).
